common.notFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

auth.magicLinkSent: Check your email! We sent a sign-in link to {email}.
auth.checkInbox: If you don't see it, check your spam folder.
auth.resendAfter: You can request a new link in 60 seconds.
auth.linkExpired: The link has expired or was already used. Request a new sign-in link.
auth.heroDescription: Moxie payments automatically generate invoices in your chosen billing system.
auth.emailHint: Enter your email and we'll send you a sign-in link.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.recentInvoicesCount: {count, plural, =0 {No recent invoices} one {# recent invoice} other {# recent invoices}}
dashboard.noInvoicesDesc: Create your first invoice manually or configure the Moxie integration.
dashboard.quickActionsDesc: Create a new invoice or check your settings.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.count: {count, plural, =0 {No invoices} one {# invoice} other {# invoices}}

invoicesNew.title: New invoice
invoicesNew.itemsWithCount: {count, plural, =0 {No items} one {# item} other {# items}}
invoicesNew.name: Name

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure your subscription, Moxie connection, billing provider and scheduling in one place.

subscription.guardMessage: Activate your subscription in Settings to use Moxie and billing connection.
subscription.sectionDescription: Subscription is required to use Moxie and billing connection.

moxie.apiKeyAlreadySaved: API key is already saved. Only enter a value to replace it.
moxie.webhookHint: In Moxie go to Webhooks, add this URL as an endpoint, and map the "InvoiceSent" event. When you set an invoice to Sent, Moxie will call this URL and we will issue the invoice.

errors.notConfigured: Moxie is not configured. Set Base URL and API key first.
errors.baseUrlNotFound: The Moxie URL was not found. You can paste the full URL from Moxie (e.g. https://pod01.withmoxie.com/api/public); the app uses the server address.
errors.invalidApiKey: Invalid API key. Check the key in your Moxie settings.
errors.forbidden: Access denied. Check your API key and permissions in Moxie.
errors.connectionFailed: Could not reach the Moxie server. Check the Base URL and your internet connection.
errors.testFailed: Connection test failed. Please check your Base URL and API key.

errors.noOrganization: No organization is linked to your account.
errors.subscriptionRequired: A subscription is required to use this feature.
errors.billingNotConfigured: Billing provider is not configured. Set up Billingo or Számlázz.hu in Settings.
errors.invoiceCreateFailed: Failed to create invoice. Try again or check your settings.
errors.checkoutFailed: Failed to start checkout. Please try again.
errors.portalFailed: Failed to open subscription management. Please try again.
errors.noSubscription: No subscription found. Please subscribe first.

billingoValidation.blocked: Invoice generation was blocked because of Billingo requirements: one or more fields are missing or invalid.
billingoValidation.missingField: The following required field is missing: {field}.
billingoValidation.missingFields: The following required fields are missing: {fields}.
billingoValidation.invalidValue: The "{field}" field has an invalid value.
billingoValidation.invalidValueWithDetail: The "{field}" field has an invalid value (item {value}).
billingoValidation.fixAndRetry: If you fix the data, you can try again (e.g. set the invoice to Sent in Moxie, or use the New invoice form).

szamlazzValidation.blocked: Invoice generation was blocked because of Számlázz.hu requirements: one or more fields are missing or invalid.
szamlazzValidation.missingField: The following required field is missing: {field}.
szamlazzValidation.missingFields: The following required fields are missing: {fields}.
szamlazzValidation.invalidValue: The "{field}" field has an invalid value.
szamlazzValidation.invalidValueWithDetail: The "{field}" field has an invalid value (item {value}).
szamlazzValidation.fixAndRetry: If you fix the data, you can try again (e.g. set the invoice to Sent in Moxie, or use the New invoice form).

billing.invoiceDefaultsHint: Used when the Moxie invoice does not provide these values.
billing.defaultBlockIdHint: Choose from your Billingo document blocks; the first is usually Billingo's default.
billing.blocksLoadError: Could not load invoice blocks. Check your API key.
billing.billingoSendByEmailHint: This only works when the customer has an email address set (e.g. in Moxie client details).

orgSettings.convertLabel: Convert to HUF when source is EUR

currencySettings.convertHint: When a Moxie payment arrives in EUR, it will be automatically converted to HUF.
currencySettings.mnbDailyHint: The current MNB mid-rate is applied every day.
currencySettings.fixedRateHint: You set the EUR/HUF rate to use for all conversions.

scheduleSettings.daysLabel: On which days should automatic invoicing run?
scheduleSettings.timeWindowHint: If enabled, invoicing will only run within the specified time window.
